emails.subject: wellheads
emails.body: wellheads Daren, Cody has a new well coming on Friday behind the 985333. Right now we don't have any nominations at that meter so I'll get with vance on that The increases according to the fax is going from 230@day to 1700 on friday and 1700 to 3200 on sat. PRIZE Energy would like to make some changes, Meter 4028 from 1270 to 820 has been flowing from 600 to 800 this month 4965 from 112 to 45 has been flowing mid 80's this month from 97 to 104
